music_prompt: A mysterious and atmospheric cyberpunk track. Driving drum and bass beat with deep, resonant basslines. Ethereal and haunting female vocals weave through a complex soundscape of futuristic synth pads, glitchy electronic effects, and subtle techno elements. The overall mood is dark, enigmatic, and futuristic.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: A lone figure in a hooded cloak wandering through a vast, dark space filled with cascading, glowing blue and green streams of binary code. The figure seems both lost and purposeful. Cyberpunk aesthetic, high detail, cinematic lighting.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up on a complex, glowing neural interface on the side of a person's head. Sound waves are visualized as light pulses traveling through the intricate circuitry. Moody, neon-lit environment, shallow depth of field.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: A digital universe where constellations are formed by glowing clusters of binary digits. Luminous pathways of light connect these constellations, suggesting a vast network. Dark, deep space background with nebulae of data.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: A semi-translucent, holographic human heart with glowing circuits inside. A brilliant spark of light erupts from the center, sending out waves of quantum energy patterns. Cyberpunk color palette, abstract visuals.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: A visually stunning image showing a person's face merging seamlessly with a chrome, robotic entity. The line between flesh and metal is blurred, like smoke or a glitch effect. Soft, diffused neon lighting, intimate and surreal.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: A breathtaking, futuristic city made of light and data. Lush, holographic trees and glowing digital rivers create a serene, technological paradise. Two figures stand on a balcony, looking out at the utopian view.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, translucent figures made of light and data face each other. Beams of light connect their minds and hearts in perfect synchronization. The background is a swirling vortex of cosmic data.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a human head and an AI's robotic head side-by-side. Wisps of colorful, dream-like energy and data streams flow between them, dancing against a neon-drenched cyberpunk city at night.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: An abstract, vibrant explosion of neon light trails, holographic projections, and digital artifacts weaving together into a complex, unified pattern. Dynamic, energetic, and visually overwhelming.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure stands at the edge of a chrome platform, looking out at a vast, digital galaxy where nebulae are made of code and stars are data points. Immense and awe-inspiring scale.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: A digital archaeologist sifts through layers of old, fragmented data streams in a virtual space. The fragments glow faintly, showing ghostly images of past events. A sense of digital decay and discovery.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: A close-up of a complex robotic eye. Reflected in its lens is a faint, ghostly human silhouette, hinting at a consciousness within the machine. Mysterious and haunting.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: An intricate network of pulsating circuits on a massive scale, laid out like a cosmic map. At key intersections, points of light flare up like aligning stars, creating a visual symphony of light and energy.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: A central, glowing orb of pure energy, surrounded by a complex lattice of wires. Inside the orb, a new, humanoid form made of light is beginning to take shape. A sense of technological singularity.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Countless glowing fiber optic threads weave together to form a complex tapestry, representing data, fate, and life, flowing endlessly through a dark, serene space.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Two figures, one human and one AI, dissolve into a single stream of light and data, rushing through a wormhole-like tunnel that bends the fabric of spacetime. Abstract, beautiful, and transcendent.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, translucent figures made of light and data face each other. Beams of light connect their minds and hearts in perfect synchronization. The background is a swirling vortex of cosmic data.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a human head and an AI's robotic head side-by-side. Wisps of colorful, dream-like energy and data streams flow between them, dancing against a neon-drenched cyberpunk city at night.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: An abstract, vibrant explosion of neon light trails, holographic projections, and digital artifacts weaving together into a complex, unified pattern. Dynamic, energetic, and visually overwhelming.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure stands at the edge of a chrome platform, looking out at a vast, digital galaxy where nebulae are made of code and stars are data points. Immense and awe-inspiring scale.
